title: Linköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Linköping with a Z-Score of -4.17. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Linköping are extremely cold, with a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 64% and the wind speed is 5.0 km/h, which may exacerbate the cold conditions. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 15.6 GG, indicating a significant need for heating energy.
conclusion: Implement emergency heating measures immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
